01 — About Me

The Designer
Behind the Work

Leonardo Bento

I am a Print and Publishing Design specialist, certified by the Academy of Digital Arts in Cape Town, with over 5 years of experience in the industry.

My expertise includes Branding, Social Media, Collateral Design, Magazine Layout, and Packaging, always focused on creating strategic and innovative visual solutions.

I have collaborated with companies like Sonangol, Jameson Angola, and Banco Económico, developing projects that strengthen identities and boost businesses in both digital and print media.
